title: stelis bractescens
intro: Stelis bractescens, also known as the yellow-flowered orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Stelis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Stelis bractescens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
